name: frankston-council-deploy
description: Static deploy for Frankston 2035 — Art That Lives.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html vision.html pilots.html posters.html print-pack.html schools.html healthy-technology.html sister-city.html media-contact.html style.css favicon.svg 404.html dist/ && cp -R assets dist/assets && cp -R downloads dist/downloads
